title: Access Point Join Process
subtitle: Complete lifecycle of a Cisco Lightweight Access Point joining a Wireless LAN Controller

steps.title: Boot Process
steps.desc: The Access Point powers on and initializes hardware components.
details: Loads Cisco IOS image from flash memory.
Initializes radios, Ethernet interfaces and system services.
Verifies hardware integrity before network communication begins.

steps.title: IP Address Acquisition
steps.desc: The AP obtains Layer 3 connectivity through DHCP.
details: Receives IP address from DHCP server.
Obtains subnet mask and default gateway.
May receive Option 43 information containing WLC addresses.

steps.title: WLC Discovery
steps.desc: The AP searches for available Wireless LAN Controllers.
details: Can discover controllers through Layer 2 broadcast.

steps.title: CAPWAP Join
steps.desc: A secure CAPWAP tunnel is established between AP and WLC.

steps.title: Configuration Download
steps.desc: The AP downloads operational configuration from the controller.
details: Receives RF parameters and power settings.

steps.title: Operational State
steps.desc: The AP becomes fully operational and serves wireless clients.
details: Participates in roaming and mobility operations.
